title: Fig. 1 in Giardia duodenalis in a clinically healthy population of captive zoo chimpanzees: Rapid antigen testing, diagnostic real-time PCR and faecal microbiota profiling
author: Willenborg, Christiana M.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 1. Captive chimpanzees and their enclosure in Sydney, Australia. (A) Main chimpanzee open air exhibit with multiple climbing structures. (B) View from the other direction showing entry to the indoor area at the end of the exhibit. (C) smaller exhibit with mesh covering and more climbing and sleeping structures. (D) Members of the chimpanzee troop at the Taronga Zoo.
steps_raw: Fig. 1. Captive chimpanzees and their enclosure in Sydney, Australia. (A) Main chimpanzee open air exhibit with multiple climbing structures. (D) Members of the chimpanzee troop at the Taronga Zoo.
